CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_GIS_Proximity_Check when FWS National Wetlands Inventory (NWI) polygon intersects the project buffer (1.0 mile). More precise than NHD waterway proximity for CWA Section 404 triggering — NHD identifies waterways, NWI identifies wetland extent. Used by NEPA_Permit_Coordinator GIS augmentation and NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator GIS bridge.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: FWS NWI wetland polygon within 1.0 mile of project. CWA Section 404 permit required. More specific than NHD waterway flag — triggers only on mapped wetland extent.
CustomField.label: Wetlands Proximity Flag (NWI)
